toppositiondata.title: HR & Admin Executive
toppositiondata.descriptionbrief: This role involves recruitment, employee relations, payroll management, office administration, procurement and compliance with company policies Assist in the recruitment and selection process by screening resumes, scheduling interviews, and conducting initial assessments.
toppositiondata.descriptionparaseven: The main responsibilities are as follows:
toppositiondata.listitemone: Assist in the recruitment and selection process by screening resumes, scheduling interviews, and conducting initial assessments.
toppositiondata.listitemtwo: Prepare and maintain accurate employee records, including personal data, contracts, and performance evaluations.
toppositiondata.listitemthree: Handle employee onboarding and orientation programs to ensure smooth onboarding into the company.
toppositiondata.sublistitemone: Manage payroll processing, attendance records, and leave management.
toppositiondata.sublistitemtwo: Assist in performance management and appraisals.
toppositiondata.listitemfour: Maintain and update HR policies and ensure compliance with labour laws and company regulations.
toppositiondata.listitemfive: Address employee queries regarding compensation, benefits, and workplace issues.
toppositiondata.listitemsix: Organize training and development sessions for staff, assist in conducting employee engagement activities to promote a positive work environment.
toppositiondata.listitemseven: Oversee daily office operations to maintain a productive and efficient work environment.
toppositiondata.listitemeight: Manage office supplies inventories, place orders as needed, and ensure uninterrupted operations.
toppositiondata.listitemnine: Coordinate with vendors and service providers for office maintenance, repairs, utilities, and equipment management.
toppositiondata.listitemten: Maintain cleanliness and organization of office spaces, adhering to hygiene standards.
toppositiondata.listitemeleven: Manage office equipment, including maintenance and repairs, to ensure smooth functionality.
toppositiondata.listitemtwelve: Identify office requirements and ensure timely procurement of supplies and equipment, maintaining cost-effectiveness through vendor evaluation and contract negotiation.
toppositiondata.listitemthirteen: Establish and maintain relationships with suppliers and service providers to secure favorable terms and agreements.
toppositiondata.listitemfourteen: Maintain accurate records of purchases, pricing, vendor agreements, and office assets to ensure proper utilization and budget tracking
toppositiondata.listitemfifteen: Conduct market research to identify quality products and obtain competitive quotes for procurement.
toppositiondata.listitemsixteen: Develop and implement administrative systems to enhance operational efficiency and streamline processes.
toppositiondata.listitemseventeen: Assist in organizing company events, meetings, and conferences, including logistics and coordination.
toppositiondata.secondtitleitemone: Bachelor’s degree in human resource management, Business Administration, or related field.
toppositiondata.secondtitleitemtwo: Minimum 2 to 3 years of experience as an HR and Admin Executive or similar role.
toppositiondata.secondtitleitemfive: Knowledge of labour laws and regulations.
toppositiondata.secondtitleitemsix: Attention to detail and problem-solving skills.
toppositiondata.secondtitleitemseven: Ability to maintain confidentiality and handle sensitive information.
toppositiondata.secondtitleitemeight: Fluent in both written, spoken English and proficiency in MS Office (Word, Excel, PowerPoint) Microsoft Teams
toppositiondata.secondtitleitemten: Willing to work as part of a team
toppositiondata.thirdtitleitemone: Timing: Winter: 10:00 AM to 07:00PM Summer: 09:00 Am to 06:00PM.
toppositiondata.thirdtitleitemtwo: Working Days: From Monday to Friday.
toppositiondata.thirdtitleitemthree: Benefits: EOBI, Gratuity, Medical Insurance IPD only.
toppositiondata.lastmessage: If you believe your background meets the criteria, please submit your CV with a cover letter.

midpositiondata.title: IT Support Analyst – Level 3 – Job Specification
midpositiondata.descriptionbrief: We are looking for an experienced IT Support Analyst who can operate Level 3 support, providing efficient, proactive, and expert-level service. Having the experience to help us give our clients the support experience they need and to develop our business. Have excellent spoken English, studies taken in English. Very good understanding of Microsoft 365 services and but not essential ESET Security Services. Excellent knowledge in PC repairs/Build.
midpositiondata.descriptionparaone: A well-established London based IT company provides exceptional IT support to a range of small businesses who are predominantly in the UK supporting the financial sector.
midpositiondata.descriptionparatwo: We pride ourselves on learning and understanding the needs of our clients, enabling us to give them excellent service. It goes without saying that you will need to have strong communication skills otherwise the technical knowledge you have will be wasted!
midpositiondata.descriptionparathree: Our clients expect you to have all the usual technical knowledge they would expect from a company like ours whilst also understanding the demands of businesses that operate in a regulated environment. Your attention to detail, strict confidentiality, good organisational skills, excellent technical knowledge and a desire to help clients with their IT related issues will enable you to succeed in this role.
midpositiondata.descriptionparafour: The company was started 11 years ago and has developed a strong reputation with our clients for great service coupled with embracing up to date IT solutions.
midpositiondata.descriptionparafive: We are looking for an experienced IT Support Analyst who can operate Level 3 support, providing efficient, proactive, and expert-level service. Having the experience to help us give our clients the support experience they need and to develop our business. Have excellent spoken English, studies taken in English. Very good understanding of Microsoft 365 services and but not essential ESET Security Services. Excellent knowledge in PC repairs/Build.
midpositiondata.descriptionparasix: An excellent level of English is a pre-requisite for this role.
midpositiondata.descriptionparaseven: The IT Support Analyst will be responsible for the following tasks:
midpositiondata.listitemone: Handle complex, unresolved issues escalated by Level 1 and Level 2 support.
midpositiondata.listitemtwo: Conduct root cause analysis for recurring or critical technical problems.
midpositiondata.sublistitemtwo: Active Directory, Group Policy Objects, DNS/DHCP, and Windows Server roles (e.g., File Services, Remote Access)
midpositiondata.listitemfour: Design, implement, and maintain virtual environments (e.g., Hyper-V, VMware, or cloud-hosted VMs).
midpositiondata.listitemfive: Managing and Administrating O365 All Admin Centre’s for Internal Company and Clients as well.
midpositiondata.listitemsix: Manage Azure AD sync, hybrid identity issues, and conditional access policies.
midpositiondata.listitemseven: Maintain SharePoint platform and creating and managing sites.
midpositiondata.listitemeight: Support and troubleshoot Microsoft Intune, Endpoint Manager, or other RMM tools.
midpositiondata.listitemnine: Monitor and manage backup systems, EDR platforms, and infrastructure alerts.
midpositiondata.listitemten: Support and troubleshoot M365 security & compliance features (e.g., DLP, retention, auditing).
midpositiondata.listitemeleven: Deploy tools and applications across the organization to protect all machines from malware and external threats.
midpositiondata.listitemtwelve: Write and deploy PowerShell scripts or automation workflows to streamline support tasks.
midpositiondata.listitemthirteen: Participate in change management processes, such as system upgrades and application rollouts.
midpositiondata.listitemfourteen: Provide mentorship and guidance to junior support team members.
midpositiondata.secondtitleitemone: Graduate in related discipline, Information Technology, Computer Science
midpositiondata.secondtitleitemtwo: Prior experience of 5 years performing IT Support functions at level 3 in a remote working environment.
midpositiondata.secondtitleitemthree: Strong knowledge of operating systems and networks, advanced tools and applications.
midpositiondata.secondtitleitemfour: Strong problem solving, time management and communication skills.
midpositiondata.thirdtitleitemone: Timing: Winter: 10:00 AM to 07:00PM Summer: 09:00 Am to 06:00PM.
midpositiondata.thirdtitleitemtwo: Working Days: From Monday to Friday.
midpositiondata.lastmessage: If you believe your background meets the criteria, please submit your CV with a cover letter.
